description: A university health center's institutional review board (IRB) has approved a mental health epidemiology study and requires an online version of the validated PHQ-9 (Patient Health Questionnaire-9) screening instrument. Log in to LimeSurvey at http://localhost/index.php/admin using admin/Admin123! to create and activate a survey titled 'PHQ-9 Mental Health Screening Study 2024' that anonymizes all responses. The survey must include three question groups: 'Symptom Frequency' containing a mandatory Array question with the nine PHQ-9 items and the standard four-point response scale (Not at all / Several days / More than half the days / Nearly every day); 'Functional Impact' containing a short-text question about interference with daily functioning; and 'Demographics' containing radio-button questions for participant age range (Under 18 / 18-24 / 25-34 / 35-44 / 45-54 / 55-64 / 65 and older) and sex (Male / Female / Prefer not to say / Prefer to self-describe).

metadata.occupation_context: Social Science Research Assistants / Clinical Psychology Researchers
metadata.real_instrument: PHQ-9 Patient Health Questionnaire (Kroenke, Spitzer & Williams, 2001, public domain)
